com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo

Class CycleLimit

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo.CycleLimit
  • Deprecated. 
    API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
    • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
    • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
    • Supply.getProductNumber()
    • Supply.getSerialNumber()
    • Supply.getDescription()
    • Supply.getMarkerColor()
    • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
    • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
    • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
    "

    @Deprecated
public class CycleLimit
extends java.lang.Object
    Provides CycleLimit information
    Since:
    API 5

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getCapacity()
      Deprecated. 
      API 8 "No longer supported. It will be return 0."
      java.lang.String getUnit()
      Deprecated. 
      API 8 "No longer supported. It will be return null."

    • Method Detail

      • getCapacity

        @Deprecated
public int getCapacity()
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer supported. It will be return 0."
        Retrieves Capacity
        Returns:
        Capacity

        • Ensures that the return numeric value is non-negative.

        Since:
        API 5

      • getUnit

        @Deprecated
public java.lang.String getUnit()
        Deprecated. API 8 "No longer supported. It will be return null."
        Retrieves Unit
        Returns:
        Unit
        • Return can be null if the value for Unit is null
        • Return can be empty if the value for Unit is empty
        Since:
        API 5
